description: make an appointment = 预约。看病前必须先预约。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to make an appointment with Dr. Williams.","zh":"我想约威廉姆斯医生。"}]

description: 社区诊所，比hospital小。海外看常见病先去clinic。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to find a clinic near my house.","zh":"我需要在附近找一家诊所。"}]

description: 诊所前台接待人员。负责预约和登记。
examples_json: [{"en":"The receptionist asked for my name and date of birth.","zh":"前台问了我的姓名和出生日期。"}]

description: 询问医生是否有空位。Is Dr. Williams available?
examples_json: [{"en":"Is Dr. Williams available this afternoon?","zh":"威廉姆斯医生今天下午有空吗？"}]

description: 患者。fill out patient information form = 填写病人信息表。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm a new patient. Do I need to fill out a form?","zh":"我是新患者，需要填表吗？"}]

description: 改变预约时间。I need to reschedule = 我需要改期。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to reschedule my appointment for next week.","zh":"我需要把预约改到下周。"}]

description: 取消预约。cancel an appointment = 取消预约。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm sorry, I need to cancel my appointment tomorrow.","zh":"抱歉，我需要取消明天的预约。"}]

description: 确认预约。有些诊所会发confirmation短信。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you confirm my appointment for Friday?","zh":"能确认一下我周五的预约吗？"}]

description: 首次就诊需要registration(登记)个人信息和保险。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm here for my appointment. I need to register first.","zh":"我来就诊的，需要先登记。"}]

description: 海外看病必备。每次就诊都要出示。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please show your insurance card at registration.","zh":"登记时请出示保险卡。"}]

description: 登记时需出示有效身份证件。护照或驾照。
examples_json: [{"en":"What ID documents do I need to bring?","zh":"我需要带什么身份证件？"}]

description: 症状——描述病情的第一步。What are your symptoms?
examples_json: [{"en":"My symptoms include a headache and a fever.","zh":"我的症状包括头痛和发烧。"}]

description: 发烧。have a fever / have a temperature = 发烧。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a fever and feel very tired.","zh":"我发烧了，感觉很累。"}]

description: 头痛。have a headache = 头痛。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've had a headache for three days.","zh":"我头痛三天了。"}]

description: 喉咙痛。感冒的常见症状之一。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a sore throat and it hurts when I swallow.","zh":"我喉咙痛，吞东西的时候疼。"}]

description: 咳嗽。dry cough = 干咳，cough up phlegm = 咳痰。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've been coughing a lot at night.","zh":"我晚上咳得很厉害。"}]

description: 流鼻涕。感冒/过敏常见症状。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a runny nose and keep sneezing.","zh":"我流鼻涕，一直打喷嚏。"}]

description: 过敏。do you have any allergies? = 你有过敏史吗？
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm allergic to penicillin.","zh":"我对青霉素过敏。"}]

description: 药物/用药。take medication = 服药。any medication? = 在吃什么药吗？
examples_json: [{"en":"Have you taken any medication for this?","zh":"你吃过什么药吗？"}]

description: 症状持续的时间。How long?/how many days?是医生必问题。
examples_json: [{"en":"The symptoms started three days ago.","zh":"症状是三天前开始的。"}]

description: 肚子痛/胃痛。have a stomachache = 肚子痛。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a terrible stomachache after eating.","zh":"我吃完东西后肚子很痛。"}]

description: 医生给出的诊断结果。What's your diagnosis? = 诊断结果是什么？
examples_json: [{"en":"The diagnosis is a throat infection.","zh":"诊断结果是喉咙感染。"}]

description: 感染。throat infection = 喉咙感染，ear infection = 耳朵感染。
examples_json: [{"en":"You have a mild ear infection.","zh":"你有轻微的耳朵感染。"}]

description: 医生开的处方。需要去药房取药。write a prescription = 开处方。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'll write you a prescription for antibiotics.","zh":"我给你开一些抗生素。"}]

description: 治疗方案。treatment plan = 治疗计划。
examples_json: [{"en":"What treatment do you recommend?","zh":"你建议怎么治疗？"}]

description: 用药剂量。take one tablet twice a day = 一天两次每次一片。
examples_json: [{"en":"What's the recommended dosage?","zh":"建议剂量是多少？"}]

description: 药房。英式常说chemist。处方要去pharmacy取。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can get the medicine at any pharmacy.","zh":"你可以在任何药房取药。"}]

description: 复诊/随访。follow-up appointment = 复诊预约。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to schedule a follow-up in two weeks.","zh":"我需要两周后安排复诊。"}]

description: 药剂师。比doctor更容易约到，小病可以直接咨询。
examples_json: [{"en":"The pharmacist recommended some cold medicine.","zh":"药剂师推荐了感冒药。"}]

description: 非处方药(OTC)。不需要prescription就能买。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is this medication available over-the-counter?","zh":"这个药是非处方药吗？"}]

description: 止痛药。ibuprofen(布洛芬)和acetaminophen(对乙酰氨基酚)最常见。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have something for pain relief?","zh":"有止痛药吗？"}]

description: 感冒药。常见有daytime/nighttime之分。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you recommend a good cold medicine?","zh":"你能推荐一种好用的感冒药吗？"}]

description: 药物副作用。服药前了解possible side effects。
examples_json: [{"en":"What are the common side effects of this medicine?","zh":"这个药常见的副作用是什么？"}]

description: 药品用法说明。take with food = 随餐服用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please read the dosage instructions carefully.","zh":"请仔细阅读用法说明。"}]

description: 便宜一些的非专利药。比品牌药(brand name)便宜很多。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have a generic version of this medication?","zh":"这药有仿制药吗？"}]

description: 医生开的处方单。取药时必须出示。
examples_json: [{"en":"Here is my prescription slip from Dr. Williams.","zh":"这是威廉姆斯医生开的处方单。"}]

description: 医疗保险。有保险药品价格可能便宜很多。
examples_json: [{"en":"Does my insurance cover this medication?","zh":"我的保险能报销这个药吗？"}]

description: 取药的等待时间。通常15-30分钟。
examples_json: [{"en":"How long is the wait time for prescriptions?","zh":"取处方药需要等多久？"}]

description: 急诊/紧急情况。emergency room (ER) = 急诊室。
examples_json: [{"en":"This is an emergency! Please call an ambulance.","zh":"这是紧急情况！请叫救护车。"}]

description: 救护车。call an ambulance = 叫救护车。紧急号:911(英美)/999(英国)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can someone call an ambulance?","zh":"谁能叫一下救护车？"}]

description: 受伤。serious injury = 重伤。minor injury = 轻伤。
examples_json: [{"en":"He has a serious injury to his leg.","zh":"他腿受了重伤。"}]

description: 急诊分诊——护士先评估紧急程度。最严重的先看。
examples_json: [{"en":"The triage nurse will assess your condition first.","zh":"分诊护士会先评估你的情况。"}]

description: 病史/既往病史。包括慢性病、手术史、过敏史。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have any medical history I should know about?","zh":"你有什么病史需要告诉我吗？"}]

description: 病情/状况。stable condition = 病情稳定。serious condition = 情况严重。
examples_json: [{"en":"His condition is stable now.","zh":"他现在情况稳定了。"}]
